text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day. Many Umamusume are
merrily walking around carrying chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to bother you so late. But, I made you some
chocolates...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?
choice_data_list:
I didn't think you were interested in this kind of
thing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well... I wanted to show my appreciation for all
you've done for me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't sure what to make at first, which is why
I'm here so late. I'm really sorry.
choice_data_list: No, no. I really appreciate it. Thank you.
No, no. I really appreciate it. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for everything, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I take the box of chocolates she's made.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... About the contents...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
These aren't your typical Valentine's Day
chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're always so busy, so... I thought I should
make some with nutritional value.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So, you see, I made them using vegetables that
help fight off fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the box to find it filled with veggie chips
coated with chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You think so? Thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I caught some of this Valentine's special on the
common-room TV as I left the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The chocolates they were showcasing were really
different from mine.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It made me think I should've tried something...
cuter.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I'm not really good at these kinds of things.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend a memorable Valentine's Day with Silence
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure what kind of food you like...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So I actually went with strawberry mochi.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the box to see two snow-white mochi,
carefully molded over the strawberry and sweet
bean paste within.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Strawberry mochi is my number-one favorite
sweet.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I might be able to make them
especially good...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering she's made two, I'd like to enjoy
them together.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh no... That wasn't my intention!
choice_data_list: It's all right. Let's eat them together!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well... If you insist.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We both stuff our mouths with the sweets. The
balance of sour strawberry and sweet bean paste
is perfect!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Mmm... So good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend a very heartwarming Valentine's Day with
Silence Suzuka.
